ic1.title: dual-flag (WAR_CONFLICT + FINANCIAL_CRISIS) verified_count threshold relaxation
ic1.description: All 196 posts have both WAR_CONFLICT and FINANCIAL_CRISIS flags. Blocked by classify_release_lane L86-89: dual AUTO_SAFE flags require verified_count >= 2. Most posts have 0-1 verified sources.
ic1.blocking_rule: article_release_guard.py L86-89: if len(risk_flags) >= 2 and set(risk_flags).issubset(AUTO_SAFE_SINGLE_RISK_FLAGS) and verified_count >= 2
ic1.proposed_change: Lower threshold from verified_count >= 2 to >= 1; return editorial_review_advised (distribution_allowed=true with warning)

external_url_count_distribution.explanation: Computed in article_release_guard.py during manifest generation but not persisted to manifest JSON. Codex must re-derive from Ghost post HTML if needed.

verified_external_source_count_distribut.explanation: Computed in article_release_guard.py during manifest generation but not persisted to manifest JSON.

ic1.estimated_rescue_count: 100-150 (depends on verified_count distribution, not visible in manifest)

codex_action.change: verified_count >= 2 -> verified_count >= 1 for dual AUTO_SAFE flag case; return editorial_review_advised

ic2.title: WAR_CONFLICT-only single-flag posts (regex over-broad)
ic2.description: 59 posts flagged WAR_CONFLICT only. All lang-ja. Blocked by L90-91: risk flag with verified_count < 1. The WAR_CONFLICT regex (L45-52) uses single keywords that fire on virtually all geopolitics articles.
ic2.blocking_rule: article_release_guard.py L90-91: if risk_flags and verified_count < 1 -> review_required
ic2.proposed_change_option_a: Narrow WAR_CONFLICT regex to compound phrases (e.g. military operation|military force instead of bare military)
ic2.proposed_change_option_b: Add external_url_count >= 2 fallback for single-flag verified_count=0 posts

trigger_term_analysis.method: slug text keyword matching + tag_slugs inference (title not available in manifest)
trigger_term_analysis.limitation: slug is romanized JA text; many JA slugs lack English WAR_CONFLICT keywords. Actual trigger is regex match against post HTML which is not in manifest.
trigger_term_analysis.inference: Most IC-2 posts are flagged via tag_slugs matching (event-military, genre-geopolitics) or JA-text regex (Japanese war terms in HTML), not English slug keywords

codex_action.test: Re-run detect_release_risk_flags against all 474 posts and compare flag counts before/after

ic3.title: FINANCIAL_CRISIS-only single-flag posts
ic3.description: 4 posts flagged FINANCIAL_CRISIS only. All lang-ja, all crypto-tagged. Blocked by L90-91: risk flag with verified_count < 1.
ic3.blocking_rule: article_release_guard.py L90-91: if risk_flags and verified_count < 1 -> review_required
ic3.proposed_change: Add fallback: if verified_count < 1 but external_url_count >= 2, return editorial_review_advised
ic3.estimated_rescue_count: up to 4 (depends on external_url_count, not in manifest)

codex_action.change: Add: elif risk_flags and verified_count < 1 and external_url_count >= 2: return editorial_review_advised
codex_action.test: Regenerate manifest; verify these 4 slugs move to editorial_review_advised

other.title: Empty risk_flags with EDITOR_REVIEW_REQUIRED error
other.description: 3 posts have empty risk_flags but EDITOR_REVIEW_REQUIRED: (empty flag string) in release_errors. Edge case in classify_release_lane.

rows.note: empty risk_flags but EDITOR_REVIEW_REQUIRED error present

empty risk_flags but EDITOR_REVIEW_REQUIRED error present

other.codex_note: Investigate classify_release_lane for empty-flags path. Fix: if not risk_flags, skip EDITOR_REVIEW_REQUIRED injection.

mojibake_audit.scope: All .py and .md files under scripts/, .claude/rules/, docs/, reports/claude_sidecar/
mojibake_audit.method: grep for known Shift_JIS-to-UTF-8 double-encoding artifacts (hex: e7b8ba, e7b9a7, e89bbb, e8ae80e68786, e88ea0e59f9fe383b8e383ac)
mojibake_audit.marker_description: Common double-encoding artifacts from Shift_JIS mishandled as UTF-8
mojibake_audit.source_files_result: ZERO mojibake findings in all 6 source files

v1_output_findings.issue: Raw mojibake marker chars embedded in JSON output value
v1_output_findings.fix: v2 uses hex descriptions instead of raw characters

v1_output_findings.issue: Same raw marker chars in markdown text
v1_output_findings.fix: v2 uses hex descriptions instead of raw characters

mojibake_audit.v2_mitigation: All marker references use ASCII hex codes or English descriptions. No raw CJK mojibake characters in this file.

vocabulary_drift_findings.finding: Some docs use Nowpattern as OS name. Canonical: NAOTO OS = OS, Nowpattern = platform
Three Brier averages coexist: 0.1780/0.1828/0.4759. Canonical: binary n=53 avg=0.4759
mission_contract.py V=value_density vs NORTH_STAR.md V=improvement_speed. Canonical: mission_contract.py v3 is authoritative
